The House of Princess

A trusted name in
Udaipur fashion.

Princess Fashion Store is one of Udaipur's most trusted clothing destinations, offering quality fashion wear for both men and women.

With a wide range of stylish collections spread across a two-floor showroom, Princess focuses on what matters most — affordability, fashion, comfort and complete customer satisfaction. From everyday essentials to standout pieces, every garment is chosen with an eye for modern style.

— Fashion, made personal.

2Floor Showroom
Why Princess

Store Highlights

Two-Floor Showroom

A spacious double-storey fashion showroom designed for relaxed, unhurried browsing.

Ladies & Gents

Dedicated collections for men and women under one elegant roof.

Premium Collection

Carefully curated, quality-checked clothing across every category.

Large Variety

An extensive range of styles, fits and sizes to suit every taste.

Trusted Locally

A familiar, dependable fashion destination loved across Udaipur.

Affordable Pricing

Premium fashion that stays friendly to every budget.

One of the best clothing showrooms in the city. The ladies' section upstairs has so much variety, and everything feels premium without the premium price tag.
